IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (44476983.pdf)
SUMMARY: Proactive Human Resources Business Partner guiding performance management, talent planning and benefits. Decisive with proven success providing employee relations support and oversight for efficient operations.
SKILLS: Leadership development, Collaborative, Organization and efficiency, Exemplary verbal and written communication, Time management, Conflict mediation, Self-starter, HR experience in Technology Field

JOB TITLE: HR Business Partner
COMPANY: Company Name - City , State

DESCRIPTION: Served as the primary point of contact for HR department, advised on performance management strategies, assisted with inquiries and investigations, identified change initiatives, developed strategies for turnover and compliance.
